heading: OPERATION OF VESSELS GENERALLY
label: 23 OPERATION OF VESSELS GENERALLY
notes: Historical and Revision NotesChapter 23 lists requirements that relate to the general operation of all vessels. These include penalties and injunctive relief for negligent operation of a vessel. It also provides penalties for failure to render assistance.
